columns.extraction_plan: For the "Abiraterone trial", extract the number of patients in the "Standard of care plus abiraterone" arm from Figure 1: Trial profile on page 4. The value is 501. For the "Abiraterone and enzalutamide trial", extract the number of patients in the "Standard of care plus abiraterone plus enzalutamide" arm from Figure 1: Trial profile on page 4. The value is 462.
